name: midas-app-automated-testing
description: Node.js test automation suite using Playwright and Cucumber

scripts.test: node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:headed: cross-env HEADED=true SLOW_MO=500 node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke: node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke:headed: cross-env HEADED=true SLOW_MO=500 node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke-search: node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke-search --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke-search:headed: cross-env HEADED=true SLOW_MO=500 node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke-search --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke-search-advanced: node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke-search-advanced --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke-search-advanced:headed: cross-env HEADED=true SLOW_MO=500 node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke-search-advanced --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke-crosswalk: node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke-crosswalk --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
scripts.test:smoke-crosswalk:headed: cross-env HEADED=true SLOW_MO=500 node utils/execution/run-with-report.js features --require step-definitions --require utils/execution/setup.js --tags @smoke-crosswalk --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json
